Group Key: (CASE WHEN ((ci ~~* '%dell%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%hp %'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%elitebook%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%thinkpad%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%latitude%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%laptop%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%desktop%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%optiplex%'::text)) THEN 'Hardware/IT Asset'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%travel%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%suitcase%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%luggage%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%bag%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%carry%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%bus%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%jet%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%boeing%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%airline%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%flight%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%hotel%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%gps%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%garmin%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%tumi%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%samsonite%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%suv%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%vehicle%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%charger%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%adapter%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%headphone%'::text)) THEN 'Travel/Accessories'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%software%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%system%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%vpn%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%cloud%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%aws%'::text)) THEN 'Software/Systems'::text ELSE 'Other'::text END)
